003 * contributor license agreements.  See the NOTICE file distributed with
004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.
005 * The ASF licenses this file to You under the Apache License, Version 2.0
006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.http.part;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Shorts.*;
021
022import java.util.*;
023import java.util.function.*;
024
025import org.apache.juneau.http.*;
026
027/**
028 * Root concrete implementation of {@link HttpPart}.
029 *
030 * <p>
031 * Holds a name/value pair representing a query parameter, form field, or path variable.  The value may be
032 * supplied eagerly (as a {@link String}) or lazily (via a {@link Supplier}).  A {@code null} value signals
033 * that the part should be omitted from the request.
034 *
035 * <p>
036 * Create instances via the static factory methods:
037 * <p class='bjava'>
038 *    <jc>// Eager</jc>
039 *    HttpPart <jv>p1</jv> = HttpPartBean.<jsm>of</jsm>(<js>"status"</js>, <js>"active"</js>);
040 *
041 *    <jc>// Lazy — evaluated at request-send time</jc>
042 *    HttpPart <jv>p2</jv> = HttpPartBean.<jsm>of</jsm>(<js>"page"</js>, () -> String.valueOf(currentPage()));
043 * </p>
044 *
045 * <p>
046 * <b>Beta — API subject to change:</b> This type is part of the next-generation REST client and HTTP stack
047 * ({@code org.apache.juneau.marshall.ng.*}).
048 * It is not API-frozen: binary- and source-incompatible changes may appear in the <b>next major</b> Juneau release
049 * (and possibly earlier).
050 * For production use cases that require long-term binary stability, continue using the existing
051 * {@code juneau-rest-client} and {@code juneau-rest-common} APIs until the {@code ng} stack is declared stable.
052 *
053 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
054 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/NextGenRestClient">juneau-ng REST client</a>
055 * </ul>
056 *
057 * @since 9.2.1
058 */
059public class HttpPartBean implements HttpPart {
060
061   private final String name;
062   private final Supplier<String> valueSupplier;
063
064   /**
065    * Constructor.
066    *
067    * @param name The part name. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
068    * @param value The part value. May be <jk>null</jk>.
069    */
070   protected HttpPartBean(String name, String value) {
071      this.name = assertArgNotNull("name", name);
072      this.valueSupplier = () -> value;
073   }
074
075   /**
076    * Constructor with lazy value supplier.
077    *
078    * @param name The part name. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
079    * @param valueSupplier Supplier that provides the value at request time. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
080    */
081   protected HttpPartBean(String name, Supplier<String> valueSupplier) {
082      this.name = assertArgNotNull("name", name);
083      this.valueSupplier = assertArgNotNull("valueSupplier", valueSupplier);
084   }
085
086   /**
087    * Creates an {@link HttpPartBean} with an eager string value.
088    *
089    * @param name The part name. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
090    * @param value The part value. May be <jk>null</jk>.
091    * @return A new instance. Never <jk>null</jk>.
092    */
093   public static HttpPartBean of(String name, String value) {
094      return new HttpPartBean(name, value);
095   }
096
097   /**
098    * Creates an {@link HttpPartBean} with a lazy value supplier.
099    *
100    * <p>
101    * The supplier is evaluated at request-send time; if it returns {@code null} the part is omitted.
102    *
103    * @param name The part name. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
104    * @param valueSupplier Supplier for the part value. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
105    * @return A new instance. Never <jk>null</jk>.
106    */
107   public static HttpPartBean of(String name, Supplier<String> valueSupplier) {
108      return new HttpPartBean(name, valueSupplier);
109   }
110
111   @Override /* HttpPart */
112   public String getName() {
113      return name;
114   }
115
116   @Override /* HttpPart */
117   public String getValue() {
118      return valueSupplier.get();
119   }
120
121   @Override /* Object */
122   public String toString() {
123      return name + "=" + getValue();
124   }
125
126   @Override /* Object */
127   public boolean equals(Object obj) {
128      return (obj instanceof HttpPartBean o2) && eq(this, o2, (x, y) -> eq(x.name, y.name) && eq(x.getValue(), y.getValue()));
129   }
130
131   @Override /* Object */
132   public int hashCode() {
133      return Objects.hash(name, getValue());
134   }
135}
